title: An Act to Exempt from the Gasoline Tax Act Ethanol-free Gasoline Used by Vehicles Off-road
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Jun 10, 2025
last_house_action: 4/24/2025 - Committee on Taxation suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 6/10/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
